News & Insights

The latest updates on human composting, terramation legislation, and sustainable end-of-life choices in the UK.

Terramation UK

Scotland Paves the Way: Water Cremation Becomes Legal North of the Border

In a landmark moment for the UK funeral industry, Scotland has become the first nation within the UK to formally legalise alkaline hydrolysis — a process widely known as aquamation or water cremation.

5 March 2026

Ministers Welcome ‘Terramation’ as Eco-Friendly Funeral Option

A new article in the Mirror has a price estimate for human composting in the UK

2 April 2024

Terramation UK

The Circular Economy of Death: Embracing Sustainability from Cradle to Grave​

The funeral industry is slowly waking up to the need for more eco-friendly practices. With over 500,000 deaths per year in the UK, traditional burials and cremations have a massive carbon footprint. Embalming fluids leach into the soil, coffins use timber and metal resources, and cremations require huge amounts of fossil fuel. However, there is a better way - human composting.

9 August 2023

Read article →
Terramation UK

Find out how human composting is not only safe, but great for the environment.

Resomation to be offered in the UK

Resomation is a process that liquefies rather than burns body tissues. It's to be legalised in the UK.

3 July 2023

Terramation UK

What is terramation?

Terramation, a term derived from "terra" (earth) and "cremation," is a natural and eco-friendly alternative to traditional burial and cremation methods.

21 March 2023

Read article →

Championing human composting and sustainable end-of-life choices in the United Kingdom. Our Close the Circle campaign is working to make terramation legal for everyone.
